use serde::{Serialize, Deserialize};

#[derive(Serialize, Deserialize)]
struct CoordMessage {
    x: f64,
    y: f64,
    z: f64,
}

// BAD: bincode serialization for tiny in-process message
fn send_to_worker(coord: &CoordMessage) {
    let bytes = bincode::serialize(coord).unwrap();
    channel.send(bytes);
}

fn receive_from_worker(channel: &Channel) -> CoordMessage {
    let bytes = channel.recv().unwrap();
    bincode::deserialize(&bytes).unwrap()
}

fn process_batch(coords: &[CoordMessage]) {
    for coord in coords {
        send_to_worker(coord);
    }
}
